title: AimTimer

body:
AimTimer is a lightweight and easy-to-use add-on for Minecraft that allows you to create countdown timers using the boss bar, action bar, experience bar (XP), or a combination of them.
You can easily add or take time, display personalized messages, and cho

This project wasn’t initially planned for release, but perhaps someone might find it useful. Additionally, I’ve included a recommended texture pack to give the bossbar a more appealing design. It's worth mentioning that this is purely decorative, as shown in the images.     Texture pack: [https://www.mediafire.com/file/hluegy182gqa25u/invisible_bossbar.zip/file](https://www.mediafire.com/file/hluegy182gqa25u/invisible_bossbar.zip/file)                                                    ‎
